stemHtml: In a METAR message, what do the abbreviations "SQ" and "PL" mean respectively?

options.a: SQ = large increase in wind lasting more than 1 min; PL = dust whirls
options.b: SQ = large increase in wind lasting more than 1 min; PL = ice pellets
options.c: SQ = large increase in wind lasting less than 1 min; PL = ice pellets
options.d: SQ = large increase in wind lasting less than 1 min; PL = pollution
